# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - "application/json"
            - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
          cache_ttl: 300
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache
        enabled: true
      # Rate limiting (generous for public catalog)
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 120
          hour: 5000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          fault_tolerant: true
        enabled: true
      # Response transformer - add cache headers
      - name: response-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Cache-Status:HIT"
              - "X-Served-By:kong-gateway"
        enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Payment Service
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 1
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - payments
      - critical
      - v1
    routes:
      # Payment processing
      - name: payment-process-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payments
          - authenticated
          - critical
      # Payment status
      - name: payment-status-route
        paths:
          - "/api/v1/payments/(?P<payment_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\\-]+)"
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - payments
          - authenticated
      # Payment refund
      - name: payment-refund-route
        paths:
          - "/api/v1/payments/(?P<payment_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\\-]+)/refund"
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 2
        tags:
          - payments
          - authenticated
          - critical
      # Payment methods
      - name: payment-methods-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/methods
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 2
        tags:
          - payments
          - authenticated
      # Payment webhooks (from payment providers)
      - name: payment-webhook-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/webhooks
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 2
        tags:
          - payments
          - external
    plugins:
      # JWT Authentication
      - name: jwt
        config:
          key_claim_name: iss
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          maximum_expiration: 1800
        enabled: true
      # ACL
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - admin
            - payment-processor
            - authenticated-user
        enabled: true
      # Strict rate limiting for payments
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 10
          hour: 100
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          fault_tolerant: false
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Payment rate limit exceeded. Please try again later."
        enabled: true
      # Request size limiting
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 2
          size_unit: megabytes
        enabled: true
      # Correlation ID
      - name: correlation-id
        config:
          header_name: X-Payment-Correlation-ID
          generator: uuid
          echo_downstream: true
        enabled: true
      # IP restriction for webhooks
      - name: ip-restriction
        route: payment-webhook-route
        config:
          allow:
            - "52.15.0.0/16"
            - "104.16.0.0/16"
            - "192.168.1.0/24"
          status: 403
          message: "Forbidden: IP not allowed"
        enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Notification Service
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: notification-service
    url: http://notification-service-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - notifications
      - v1
    routes:
      # Send notification
      - name: notification-send-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notifications
          - authenticated
      # Get notifications
      - name: notification-list-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notifications
          - authenticated
      # Mark as read
      - name: notification-read-route
        paths:
          - "/api/v1/notifications/(?P<notification_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\\-]+)/read"
        methods:
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - notifications
          - authenticated
      # Notification preferences
      - name: notification-preferences-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/preferences
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - notifications
          - authenticated
    plugins:
      # JWT Authentication
      - name: jwt
        config:
          key_claim_name: iss
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
        enabled: true
      # Rate limiting
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 30
          hour: 500
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          fault_tolerant: true
        enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # API Documentation & Health (Internal)
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: api-docs-service
    url: http://api-docs.internal:3000
    protocol: http
    port: 3000
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 10000
    read_timeout: 10000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - documentation
      - internal
    routes:
      # Swagger / OpenAPI docs
      - name: api-docs-route
        paths:
          - /api/docs
          - /api/swagger
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
          - http
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        tags:
          - documentation
          - public
      # API Health check endpoint
      - name: api-health-route
        paths:
          - /api/health
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
          - http
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        tags:
          - health
          - public

# =============================================================================
# CONSUMERS
# =============================================================================

consumers:
  # Internal Service Consumers
  - username: internal-web-app
    custom_id: "web-app-001"
    tags:
      - internal
      - web
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: web-app-issuer
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${KONG_JWT_SECRET_WEB_APP}"
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-user

  - username: internal-mobile-app
    custom_id: "mobile-app-001"
    tags:
      - internal
      - mobile
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: mobile-app-issuer
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${KONG_JWT_SECRET_MOBILE_APP}"
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-user

  - username: admin-dashboard
    custom_id: "admin-001"
    tags:
      - internal
      - admin
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: admin-issuer
        algorithm: RS256
        rsa_public_key: "${KONG_JWT_RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_ADMIN}"
    acls:
      - group: admin
      - group: user-manager
      - group: order-manager
      - group: payment-processor

  # External Partner Consumers
  - username: partner-integration-alpha
    custom_id: "partner-alpha-001"
    tags:
      - external
      - partner
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "${KONG_API_KEY_PARTNER_ALPHA}"
        tags:
          - partner-alpha
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-user

  - username: partner-integration-beta
    custom_id: "partner-beta-001"
    tags:
      - external
      - partner
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "${KONG_API_KEY_PARTNER_BETA}"
        tags:
          - partner-beta
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-user

  # Payment Provider Webhook Consumer
  - username: payment-provider-webhook
    custom_id: "payment-webhook-001"
    tags:
      - external
      - payment-provider
    acls:
      - group: payment-processor

# =============================================================================
# GLOBAL PLUGINS
# =============================================================================

plugins:
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Logging & Observability
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # HTTP Log - send access logs to centralized logging
  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: "http://log-collector.internal:9200/kong-logs/_doc"
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      flush_timeout: 2
      retry_count: 3
      content_type: "application/json"
      custom_fields_by_lua:
        environment: "return 'production'"
        gateway_version: "return '3.0'"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

  # Prometheus metrics
  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

  # Zipkin distributed tracing
  - name: zipkin
    config:
      http_endpoint: "http://zipkin.internal:9411/api/v2/spans"
      sample_ratio: 0.1
      default_service_name: kong-gateway
      include_credential: true
      traceid_byte_count: 16
      header_type: preserve
      default_header_type: b3-single
    enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Security
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # CORS - Cross Origin Resource Sharing
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://partner.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - HEAD
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-API-Version
        - X-Correlation-ID
        - X-Product-Region
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
        - X-Cache-Status
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - https
      - http

  # Bot detection
  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      allow: []
      deny:
        - "Googlebot"
        - "Bingbot"
    enabled: false

  # Request termination for maintenance mode (disabled by default)
  - name: request-termination
    config:
      status_code: 503
      message: "API is currently under maintenance. Please try again later."
      content_type: "application/json"
      body: '{"error":{"code":503,"message":"Service temporarily unavailable for maintenance","retry_after":300}}'
    enabled: false
    tags:
      - maintenance

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Traffic Control (Global defaults)
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Global rate limiting fallback
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 3000
      day: 50000
      policy: redis
      redis_host: redis.internal
      redis_port: 6379
      redis_database: 0
      redis_timeout: 2000
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      error_code: 429
      error_message: "API rate limit exceeded"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

  # Request size limiting (global default)
  - name: request-size-limiting
    config:
      allowed_payload_size: 10
      size_unit: megabytes
      require_content_length: false
    enabled: true

  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Transformations
  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Global response transformer
  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Powered-By:Kong-Gateway"
          - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
          - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
          - "X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block"
          - "Cache-Control:no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate"
          - "Pragma:no-cache"
      remove:
        headers:
          - "Server"
          - "X-Powered-By-Upstream"
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

# =============================================================================
# CERTIFICATES (TLS/SSL)
# =============================================================================

certificates:
  - cert: "${KONG_SSL_CERT}"
    key: "${KONG_SSL_CERT_KEY}"
    tags:
      - production
      - primary
    snis:
      - name: api.example.com
      - name: "*.api.example.com"

  - cert: "${KONG_SSL_CERT_INTERNAL}"
    key: "${KONG_SSL_CERT_KEY_INTERNAL}"
    tags:
      - internal
    snis:
      - name: internal.api.example.com

# =============================================================================
# VAULTS (Secret Management)
# =============================================================================

vaults:
  - name: env
    prefix: kong-env-vault
    description: "Environment variable based vault for secrets"
    config:
      prefix: "KONG_VAULT_"
    tags:
      - vault
      - env
